name: developer-relations
description: Developer Relations (DevRel) specialist team — 4 agents covering the DevRel operating model (program design, exec narrative, DX as the product, activation metrics), developer advocacy (content, talks, demos, community engagement), developer experience & docs (quickstarts, API reference, time-to-first-value), and community & ecosystem (community health, ambassadors, contribution funnel). Ships 3 skills (devrel-program-design, developer-content-and-advocacy, developer-experience-measurement), 3 commands, 2 templates, 5 best-practices, a decision-tree knowledge bank, an advisory anti-pattern hook, and a stdlib DX-metrics calculator. Audience: DevRel leaders, developer advocates, DX/docs engineers, community managers. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
